linapro-oidc-google.description: Reference source plugin that demonstrates Google OIDC third-party login on the framework external-identity seam.
linapro-oidc-google.name: Google OIDC Login

callback.error: Google login failed. Please try again.
callback.unlinked: This Google account is not linked to any local user. Please contact the administrator.

settings.title: Google OIDC Settings
settings.description: Configure the Google OAuth 2.0 client used by the login button. The redirect URL must match the callback URL registered in Google Cloud Console.
settings.clientIdPlaceholder: Enter the Google OAuth 2.0 client ID
settings.clientSecretPlaceholder: Enter the Google OAuth 2.0 client secret
settings.clientSecretKeepPlaceholder: Leave unchanged to keep the stored secret
settings.redirectUrlHint: Fixed by the plugin. Copy this URL into the Authorized redirect URIs of your Google Cloud OAuth client.
settings.saveFailed: Failed to save Google OIDC settings.
settings.loadFailed: Failed to load Google OIDC settings.
settings.enableSsoHint: When enabled, logins started with a matching state key deliver the tokens straight to the configured third-party receiver URL instead of the workspace.
settings.copyFailed: Failed to copy the login URL.
